message:
fix(session,pkg): add turbofish type annotations to finish_worker_result test calls

Add explicit type parameters to finish_worker_result and
finish_package_task calls in tests where the compiler cannot infer the
error type from Ok(Ok(value)) patterns:

- session.rs: finish_worker_result::<usize, ()> in success-payload test
- package_manager.rs: finish_package_task::<(), _> in cancellation test
  and finish_package_task::<usize, ()> in success-payload test

These are compile-fix annotations — the generic helpers need the error
type specified when the only call argument is an Ok variant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
